flags.label: API Key
flags.description: Direct API key for Anthropic inference — bypasses OAuth flow entirely.

flags.label: Auth Token
flags.description: Bearer token used as an alternative credential, checked before OAuth sources.

flags.label: Base URL
flags.description: Reroutes all API traffic to a custom endpoint, overriding the default api.anthropic.com.

flags.label: Identity Token
flags.description: Inline OIDC federation identity token used for token-exchange auth when no identity_token_file path is configured.

flags.label: Unix Socket
flags.description: Routes Anthropic API requests through a local Unix domain socket instead of TCP.

flags.label: Account Tagged ID
flags.description: Overrides the OTEL account ID tag used in telemetry metrics, falls back to a derived value.

flags.label: Account UUID
flags.description: Injects account UUID to pre-populate OAuth session without interactive login.

flags.label: API Base URL
flags.description: Reroutes Files API calls to a custom base URL, falling back to ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL.

flags.label: API Key File Descriptor
flags.description: Reads the API key from a file descriptor, enabling secure secret injection without env-var exposure.

flags.label: API Key Helper TTL
flags.description: Controls how long the API key helper script result is cached before re-executing.

flags.label: Attribution Header
flags.description: Suppresses the Claude Code attribution header appended to API requests when set.

flags.label: Custom OAuth URL
flags.description: Overrides the OAuth base URL to an approved custom endpoint for non-production auth flows.

flags.label: OAuth Client ID
flags.description: Overrides the default OAuth client ID used during the authorization code flow.

flags.label: OAuth Refresh Token
flags.description: Seeds an OAuth refresh token directly, skipping the interactive browser login step.

flags.label: OAuth Scopes
flags.description: Declares space-separated OAuth scopes required when bootstrapping via a refresh token.

flags.label: OAuth Token
flags.description: Provides a pre-issued OAuth access token, bypassing device-flow login entirely.

flags.label: OAuth Token File Descriptor
flags.description: Reads the OAuth access token from a file descriptor for secure secret injection.

flags.label: Organization UUID
flags.description: Pins requests to a specific organization UUID, bypassing the profile-fetch lookup.

flags.label: Session Access Token
flags.description: Provides a session-scoped access token used by remote/bridge entrypoints instead of OAuth.

flags.label: User Email
flags.description: Injects user email to pre-populate OAuth session alongside account UUID and org UUID.

flags.label: WebSocket Auth FD
flags.description: Reads the WebSocket session ingress token from a file descriptor for remote mode auth.

flags.label: Additional CLAUDE.md Dirs
flags.description: Adds extra directories to scan for CLAUDE.md and rules files, expanding the system-prompt context.

tokenEffect.notes: Each extra dir can add full CLAUDE.md content

flags.label: Auto Compact Window
flags.description: Token threshold for auto-compaction. Lower = more aggressive compaction.

tokenEffect.notes: Governs when the context window is summarized

flags.label: Cold Compact
flags.description: TODO: Add description

flags.label: Disable Auto Memory
flags.description: Disables automatic memory reads and writes, removing memory content from each turn's context.

tokenEffect.notes: Eliminates per-turn memory injection

flags.label: Disable CLAUDE.md Files
flags.description: Strips all CLAUDE.md file content from the system prompt entirely.

tokenEffect.notes: Removes all project/user instruction context

flags.label: Disable Git Instructions
flags.description: Strips built-in git workflow instructions from the system prompt.

tokenEffect.notes: Removes ~1 section of built-in instructions

flags.label: Disable Precompact Skip
flags.description: Forces the full compaction pipeline, disabling the fast-path short-circuit for large contexts.

flags.label: Enable Away Summary
flags.description: Enables an idle-return summary notification when resuming after an away period.

tokenEffect.notes: Injects a short summary message on return

flags.label: Idle Threshold
flags.description: Controls the inactivity window (in minutes) before idle-state detection fires. Default 75.

flags.label: Idle Token Threshold
flags.description: Sets the minimum context token count required before idle-state detection activates. Default 100000.

flags.label: Include Partial Messages
flags.description: Includes incomplete in-flight messages in the context window during streaming.

tokenEffect.notes: Adds partial assistant turn tokens to context

flags.label: Max Context Tokens
flags.description: Overrides the model context window size, active only when DISABLE_COMPACT is also set.

tokenEffect.notes: User-supplied value sets the window ceiling

flags.label: Remote Memory Dir
flags.description: Redirects memory and session storage to an alternative directory for remote deployments.

tokenEffect.notes: Memory content injected from alternate path

flags.label: Resume From Session
flags.description: Hydrates conversation context from a specific prior session ID via the Sessions API.

tokenEffect.notes: Loads a full prior session into context

flags.label: Resume Interrupted Turn
flags.description: Automatically resumes an interrupted turn by re-injecting its message content.

tokenEffect.notes: Replays the last interrupted message

flags.label: Resume Prompt
flags.description: TODO: Add description

flags.label: Resume Threshold
flags.description: Sets minutes since the last message before the resume-session flow is offered. Default 70.

flags.label: Resume Token Threshold
flags.description: Sets the minimum token count required before the resume-session prompt appears. Default 100000.

flags.label: Skip Prompt History
flags.description: Skips loading persisted prompt history at session start, suppressing prior-turn entries.

tokenEffect.notes: Prevents prior session history from being loaded

flags.label: Profile
flags.description: Selects which profile file to load from <config_dir>/configs/<profile>.json, overriding the active_config pointer and defaulting to "default".

flags.label: Debug Log Level
flags.description: Controls the minimum log severity written to the debug log file (verbose/debug/info/warn/error).

flags.label: Debug Logs Dir
flags.description: Redirects debug log output to a specific file path instead of the default session log.

flags.label: Debug Repaints
flags.description: Enables UI repaint cycle tracking, surfacing which React components are re-rendering.

flags.label: Diagnostics File
flags.description: Writes structured diagnostic events to a specified file path for external analysis.

flags.label: Frame Timing Log
flags.description: Logs per-frame render timing including phase breakdowns and RSS memory usage.

flags.label: Perfetto Trace
flags.description: Enables Perfetto-format performance tracing for agent process and thread activity.

flags.label: Profile Query
flags.description: Enables per-query profiling checkpoints, surfacing a timing report on demand.

flags.label: Profile Startup
flags.description: Enables detailed startup phase profiling and emits a startup-perf telemetry event.

flags.label: Slow Op Threshold
flags.description: Sets the threshold (ms) above which operations are flagged as slow in diagnostics.

flags.label: Stall Timeout (Testing)
flags.description: Overrides the stall-detection abort timeout for test harnesses.

flags.label: Identity Token File
flags.description: Path to a file containing the OIDC federation identity token, preferred over the inline ANTHROPIC_IDENTITY_TOKEN value.

flags.label: Auto Connect IDE
flags.description: Forces automatic IDE extension connection on startup, or explicitly disables it when false.

tokenEffect.notes: IDE connection adds tool schemas to context

flags.label: Hide Cwd
flags.description: Hides the current working directory from the TUI status header.

flags.label: IDE Host Override
flags.description: Overrides the IDE host address, bypassing WSL gateway detection entirely.

flags.label: IDE Skip Auto Install
flags.description: Prevents automatic IDE extension installation on startup.

flags.label: IDE Skip Valid Check
flags.description: Skips workspace-folder validation when discovering IDE connections.

flags.label: Agent List In Messages
flags.description: Injects agent-type and tool availability summaries into every message.

tokenEffect.notes: Small per-turn block per agent registered

flags.label: Disable Advisor Tool
flags.description: Removes the advisor tool definition, preventing it from appearing in the tool list.

tokenEffect.notes: Drops one tool schema from context

flags.label: Disable Attachments
flags.description: Strips @-mentioned files, MCP resources, and agent-mention attachments from context.

tokenEffect.notes: Eliminates all pre-turn attachment loading

flags.label: Disable Background Tasks
flags.description: Disables background agent execution and removes the run_in_background tool parameter.

tokenEffect.notes: Removes background task instruction block

flags.label: Disable Claude API Skill
flags.description: Skips registration of the built-in claude-api skill at startup.

tokenEffect.notes: Drops claude-api skill tool schema

flags.label: Disable Cron
flags.description: Disables scheduled and recurring cron task tools entirely.

tokenEffect.notes: Drops cron create/list/delete tool schemas

flags.label: Disable Experimental Betas
flags.description: Disables all experimental beta API features, including context management and tool streaming.

tokenEffect.notes: Prevents beta header and feature flag injection

flags.label: Disable Feedback Survey
flags.description: Suppresses in-session feedback survey prompts regardless of timing conditions.

flags.label: Disable File Checkpointing
flags.description: Disables file-state snapshot tracking, preventing undo/restore for file edits.

flags.label: Disable Marketplace Autoinstall
flags.description: Prevents automatic installation of plugins from the official marketplace on startup.

tokenEffect.notes: Skipped marketplace plugins don't add tool schemas

flags.label: Disable Policy Skills
flags.description: Skips loading admin/org-managed policy skills from policySettings directories.

tokenEffect.notes: Each suppressed skill removes tool schemas

flags.label: Enable Background Plugin Refresh
flags.description: Triggers a plugin reload in the background after an install completes, instead of blocking.

flags.label: Enable CFC
flags.description: Enables Claude-in-Chrome (CFC) mode, overriding the config-file default.

flags.label: Fine Grained Tool Streaming
flags.description: Enables eager input streaming on tool calls, sending partial inputs before completion.

tokenEffect.notes: Adds eager_input_streaming field to tool schemas

flags.label: Enable Prompt Suggestions
flags.description: Controls AI-generated next-prompt suggestions; overrides the GrowthBook feature flag.

tokenEffect.notes: Each suggestion fires a lightweight model call

flags.label: SDK File Checkpointing
flags.description: Enables file-state checkpointing in SDK (headless) mode, where it is otherwise off.

flags.label: Token Usage Attachment
flags.description: Appends a token-usage block to every message, showing used/total/remaining counts.

tokenEffect.notes: Small per-turn stats block added to messages

flags.label: Enable XAA
flags.description: Enables XAA (external agent authentication) OIDC flow for MCP server OAuth.

flags.label: Extra Body
flags.description: Merges a JSON object into every API request body, enabling unsupported API fields.

tokenEffect.notes: Effect depends entirely on injected fields

flags.label: Extra Metadata
flags.description: Injects custom JSON fields into the metadata object sent with every API request.

flags.label: Max Tool Concurrency
flags.description: Caps the number of tool calls that execute in parallel per turn; defaults to 10.

tokenEffect.notes: Higher = more concurrent tool results per turn

flags.label: MCP Allowlist Env
flags.description: Passes the full host environment to MCP servers instead of a scrubbed subset.

flags.label: MCP Server Name
flags.description: Set internally by the CLI and passed to headersHelper subprocesses as the current MCP server name.

flags.label: MCP Server URL
flags.description: Set internally by the CLI and passed to headersHelper subprocesses as the current MCP server URL.

flags.label: Plugin Cache Dir
flags.description: Overrides the directory where downloaded plugin archives are cached.

flags.label: Plugin Git Timeout
flags.description: Sets the timeout for git clone/pull operations when installing marketplace plugins.

flags.label: Plugin Prefer Https
flags.description: TODO: Add description

flags.label: Plugin Seed Dir
flags.description: Adds colon-delimited directories as local plugin seed sources, bypassing marketplace downloads.

tokenEffect.notes: Each loaded plugin adds tool schemas

flags.label: Plugin Zip Cache
flags.description: Switches plugin storage to a ZIP-based cache, enabling faster cold installs.

flags.label: Session Ingress Version
flags.description: Set internally when spawning bridge sessions to select the v2 POST-based ingress transport.

flags.label: Subprocess Env Scrub
flags.description: Enables environment-variable scrubbing and bubblewrap isolation for all subprocesses.

flags.label: Sync Plugin Install
flags.description: Forces synchronous plugin installation, blocking the first prompt until all plugins load.

tokenEffect.notes: All installed plugins add tool schemas before first turn

flags.label: Plugin Install Timeout
flags.description: Caps how long synchronous plugin installation may block before being aborted.

flags.label: Betas
flags.description: Appends comma-separated beta feature identifiers to every API request's beta header.

tokenEffect.notes: Header only; token impact depends on enabled beta

flags.label: Custom Headers
flags.description: Injects newline-delimited HTTP headers into every Anthropic API request.

flags.label: Custom Model Option
flags.description: Adds a custom model ID to the CLI model picker as a selectable option.

flags.label: Custom Model Description
flags.description: Sets the picker description string shown for the custom model option.

flags.label: Custom Model Name
flags.description: Sets the display label shown for the custom model in the CLI model picker.

flags.label: Custom Model Capabilities
flags.description: Declares a comma-separated capability list for the custom model, enabling feature routing.

flags.label: Default Haiku Model
flags.description: Remaps the 'haiku' model alias to a custom model ID, including Bedrock fallback IDs.

flags.label: Haiku Model Description
flags.description: Sets the description shown in the model picker for the overridden Haiku model.

flags.label: Haiku Model Name
flags.description: Sets the display label shown in the model picker for the overridden Haiku model.

flags.label: Haiku Model Capabilities
flags.description: Declares capabilities for the overridden Haiku model, controlling feature routing.

flags.label: Default Opus Model
flags.description: Remaps the 'opus' model alias to a custom model ID, including Bedrock fallback IDs.

flags.label: Opus Model Description
flags.description: Sets the description shown in the model picker for the overridden Opus model.

flags.label: Opus Model Name
flags.description: Sets the display label shown in the model picker for the overridden Opus model.

flags.label: Opus Model Capabilities
flags.description: Declares feature capabilities for the custom Opus model, overriding built-in detection.

flags.label: Default Sonnet Model
flags.description: Overrides which model ID resolves when 'sonnet' tier is requested.

flags.label: Sonnet Model Description
flags.description: Sets the display description shown in the model picker for a custom Sonnet model.

flags.label: Sonnet Model Name
flags.description: Sets the display name shown in the model picker for a custom Sonnet model.

flags.label: Sonnet Model Capabilities
flags.description: Declares feature capabilities for the custom Sonnet model, overriding built-in detection.

flags.label: Log Level
flags.description: Controls Anthropic SDK log verbosity (error / warn / info / debug).

flags.label: Main Model Override
flags.description: Overrides the primary model entirely, replacing the default Sonnet selection.

flags.label: Small/Fast Model
flags.description: Overrides the lightweight model used for hooks, classifiers, and background utility calls.

tokenEffect.notes: Affects cost, not token surface

flags.label: Small Model AWS Region
flags.description: Pins the small/fast model to a specific AWS Bedrock region, independent of the main model region.

flags.label: Agent Cost Steering
flags.description: Enables cost-steering logic that selects cheaper sub-agent models for Pro-tier users.

tokenEffect.notes: Affects model routing, not token volume

flags.label: Always Enable Effort
flags.description: Forces effort-level controls on all models, bypassing the Opus/Sonnet-only gate.

tokenEffect.notes: Unlocks thinking budget on models that normally skip it

flags.label: Disable Adaptive Thinking
flags.description: Forces fixed thinking budgets on Opus/Sonnet-4-6, disabling the adaptive budget algorithm.

tokenEffect.notes: May raise or lower thinking spend vs adaptive default

flags.label: Disable Fast Mode
flags.description: Disables fast-mode inference, forcing the standard (slower) API path.

flags.label: Disable Legacy Model Remap
flags.description: Prevents automatic remapping of legacy model names (e.g. old Opus IDs) to current equivalents.

flags.label: Disable Nonstreaming Fallback
flags.description: Prevents falling back to non-streaming API calls on stream timeout or idle errors.

flags.label: Disable Thinking
flags.description: Eliminates extended-thinking tokens entirely by hard-disabling the thinking budget.

flags.label: Effort Level
flags.description: Sets reasoning effort for supported models: low / medium / high / xhigh; overrides per-session effort.

tokenEffect.notes: Higher values proportionally increase thinking budget

flags.label: Enable Append Subagent Prompt
flags.description: Enables appending an extra system prompt to every Task-tool subagent and its nested descendants.

tokenEffect.notes: Repeated each subagent call; propagates recursively

flags.label: Enable Experimental Advisor Tool
flags.description: Force-enables the experimental advisor server tool, bypassing the GrowthBook feature flag.

flags.label: Enable Gateway Model Discovery
flags.description: TODO: Add description

flags.label: Fork Subagent
flags.description: Force-enables the fork-subagent feature, bypassing the GrowthBook rollout gate.

tokenEffect.notes: Enables Task-tool fork-self capability

flags.label: Max Output Tokens
flags.description: Caps output tokens per response, applied as a hard upper limit before the model default.

flags.label: Subagent Model
flags.description: Overrides the model used for all subagent Task calls; set to 'haiku' or 'sonnet' to reduce cost.

tokenEffect.notes: Affects cost per subagent call, not token surface

flags.label: Cert Store
flags.description: Specifies CA certificate sources (comma-separated 'bundled' and/or 'system') for TLS validation.

flags.label: Client Cert
flags.description: Loads a PEM client certificate from the given path to enable mTLS for outbound API requests.

flags.label: Client Key
flags.description: Loads a PEM private key from the given path to pair with the mTLS client certificate.

flags.label: Client Key Passphrase
flags.description: Supplies the passphrase to decrypt an encrypted mTLS client private key.

flags.label: Enable Proxy Auth Helper
flags.description: Activates the proxy auth helper subprocess that fetches credentials on demand; requires value '1'.

flags.label: HTTP Proxy Port
flags.description: Sets the HTTP proxy port forwarded into the sandbox environment for host network access.

flags.label: SOCKS Proxy Port
flags.description: Sets the SOCKS proxy port forwarded into the sandbox environment for host network access.

flags.label: HTTP Proxy
flags.description: Fallback HTTP proxy URL used when HTTP_PROXY/http_proxy are unset, and propagated to subprocess tooling (npm, Yarn, Docker, JVM).

flags.label: HTTPS Proxy
flags.description: Fallback HTTPS proxy URL used when HTTPS_PROXY/https_proxy are unset, and propagated to subprocess tooling (npm, Yarn, Docker, JVM).

flags.label: Proxy Auth Helper Ttl Ms
flags.description: Controls how long (ms) proxy auth credentials are cached before the helper subprocess is re-invoked.

flags.label: Proxy Authenticate
flags.description: Passes an authentication credential into the proxy auth helper subprocess as an environment variable.

flags.label: Proxy Host
flags.description: Forwards the proxy hostname to the auth helper subprocess; auto-derived from CLAUDE_CODE_PROXY_URL when unset.

flags.label: Proxy Resolves Hosts
flags.description: Delegates DNS resolution to the proxy agent, bypassing local resolver for outbound requests.

flags.label: Proxy Url
flags.description: Reroutes all outbound API traffic through the specified proxy server URL.

flags.label: Skip Bedrock Auth
flags.description: Bypasses AWS Bedrock credential resolution, allowing unauthenticated or pre-signed requests.

flags.label: Skip Fast Mode Net Errors
flags.description: Suppresses the fast-mode unavailable warning when the status check returns a network error.

flags.label: Skip Foundry Auth
flags.description: Bypasses Azure AD token acquisition for Microsoft Foundry, skipping DefaultAzureCredential flow.

flags.label: Skip Mantle Auth
flags.description: Bypasses AWS credential resolution for the Amazon Bedrock Mantle endpoint.

flags.label: Skip Vertex Auth
flags.description: Bypasses Google Cloud application-default credential acquisition for Vertex AI.

flags.label: Accessibility
flags.description: Enables accessibility mode, suppressing animated TUI elements for screen-reader compatibility.

flags.label: Brief Mode
flags.description: Activates brief-only display mode, collapsing long assistant responses to head+tail summaries.

tokenEffect.notes: UI rendering only; does not alter model output

flags.label: Brief Upload
flags.description: Routes file attachment uploads through the compact REPL bridge path instead of the standard uploader.

flags.label: Bs As Ctrl Backspace
flags.description: TUI input tweak: maps a plain Backspace keypress to Ctrl+Backspace (delete-previous-word) in the prompt editor. Intended for terminals — notably mintty/cygwin on Windows — that can't distinguish the two key events, letting word-delete work without a custom keymap.

flags.label: Commit Log
flags.description: Enables React render commit timing logs to the specified path, for UI performance profiling.

flags.label: Decstbm
flags.description: Gates the DECSTBM (VT 'Set Top and Bottom Margins' / scroll-region) fast path in the new marlin_porch TUI renderer. When enabled, the renderer uses scroll-region escapes for partial screen updates instead of full redraws; when gated, it falls back to the safe redraw path. Emits 'DECSTBM: enabled' or 'DECSTBM: gated' at startup based on terminal capability probing.

flags.label: Disable Mouse
flags.description: Disables mouse event handling in the terminal UI, preventing click and scroll capture.

flags.label: Disable Terminal Title
flags.description: Prevents Claude Code from updating the terminal window or tab title during sessions.

flags.label: Disable Virtual Scroll
flags.description: Disables virtualised transcript rendering, forcing all messages to render simultaneously.

flags.label: Eager Flush
flags.description: Forces immediate stdout flush after each response chunk, useful for piped or cowork sessions.

flags.label: Exit After First Render
flags.description: Exits the process immediately after the first UI render cycle completes, for startup testing.

flags.label: Exit After Stop Delay
flags.description: Auto-exits the CLI after the specified idle milliseconds following the last response stop.

flags.label: Force Full Logo
flags.description: Forces the full ASCII logo to render regardless of terminal width or context.

flags.label: Force Fullscreen Upsell
flags.description: Forces the fullscreen-mode upsell prompt regardless of seen-count or feature-flag gate.

flags.label: No Flicker
flags.description: Enables the flicker-free alt-screen renderer, overriding tmux/iTerm2 detection that would disable it.

flags.label: Question Preview Format
flags.description: Sets question preview rendering format to markdown or html, overriding per-entrypoint defaults.

tokenEffect.notes: Format only, no content change

flags.label: Scroll Speed
flags.description: Overrides terminal scroll speed multiplier; capped at 20, defaults to 1 (3 on Windows).

flags.label: Simple Mode
flags.description: Enables bare/minimal output mode, suppressing decorations and disabling auto-memory.

tokenEffect.notes: Disables auto-memory injection

flags.label: Simple System Prompt
flags.description: Swaps the full system prompt for a minimal identity-only prompt, dropping all dynamic sections (alias of CLAUDE_CODE_SIMPLE).

flags.label: Syntax Highlight
flags.description: Controls syntax highlighting for code blocks; set to falsy to disable, or a BAT theme name to override.

flags.label: Agent Name
flags.description: Sets the identity name for this agent instance, required for multi-agent team broadcasts.

flags.label: Blocking Limit Override
flags.description: Overrides the token count at which the CLI blocks and refuses further turns.

tokenEffect.notes: Shifts the blocking threshold

flags.label: Enable Tasks
flags.description: Forces the task-tracking system on, bypassing the feature-flag gate.

tokenEffect.notes: Task state injected per turn

flags.label: Agent Teams
flags.description: Enables multi-agent team spawning; multiplies token usage proportionally to team size.

tokenEffect.notes: Each sub-agent gets full context

flags.label: Plan Interview Phase
flags.description: Enables the interview/clarification phase at the start of plan mode, overriding the feature flag.

tokenEffect.notes: Adds interview turns to conversation

flags.label: Plan Mode Required
flags.description: Forces plan mode before any execution, blocking agentic tool use until a plan is approved.

tokenEffect.notes: Adds plan-mode instruction block

flags.label: Plan Version
flags.description: Selects the plan-mode implementation version or variant (e.g. v2).

tokenEffect.notes: Different versions inject different prompts

flags.label: Task List ID
flags.description: Pins the task-list namespace to a specific ID, overriding the team or session default.

flags.label: Anthropic AWS API Key
flags.description: API key for the Anthropic-on-AWS platform, bypassing AWS credential chain resolution.

flags.label: Anthropic AWS Base URL
flags.description: Reroutes Anthropic-on-AWS traffic to a custom endpoint, overriding the region-derived default.

flags.label: Anthropic AWS Workspace ID
flags.description: Required workspace ID sent as the anthropic-workspace-id header for Anthropic-on-AWS requests.

flags.label: Bedrock Base URL
flags.description: Reroutes AWS Bedrock traffic to a custom endpoint, overriding the region-derived default.

flags.label: Bedrock Mantle API Key
flags.description: API key for the Amazon Bedrock Mantle managed-access backend.

flags.label: Bedrock Mantle Base URL
flags.description: Reroutes Bedrock Mantle traffic to a custom endpoint, overriding the region-derived default.

flags.label: Bedrock Service Tier
flags.description: TODO: Add description

flags.label: Foundry API Key
flags.description: API key for Microsoft Azure Foundry; mutually exclusive with Azure AD token provider.

flags.label: Foundry Auth Token
flags.description: Auth token for Microsoft Azure Foundry client construction.

flags.label: Foundry Base URL
flags.description: Reroutes Microsoft Azure Foundry traffic to a custom endpoint; required if no resource name is set.

flags.label: Foundry Resource
flags.description: Sets the Azure Foundry resource name, used to construct the base URL when no explicit URL is provided.

flags.label: Vertex Base URL
flags.description: Reroutes Google Vertex AI traffic to a custom endpoint, overriding the region-derived default.

flags.label: Vertex Project ID
flags.description: Specifies the GCP project for Vertex AI when no GCLOUD_PROJECT env var is present.

flags.label: Provider Managed By Host
flags.description: Signals that the host environment manages provider config, stripping auth env vars from subprocesses.

flags.label: Use Anthropic AWS
flags.description: Routes all API calls through Anthropic's AWS platform (distinct from native Bedrock).

flags.label: Use Bedrock
flags.description: Routes all API calls through AWS Bedrock, disabling first-party error reporting.

flags.label: Use CCR Version
flags.description: Selects the CCR transport version (e.g. v2 switches to SSE-based streaming over WebSocket).

flags.label: Use Foundry
flags.description: Routes all API calls through Microsoft Azure Foundry, disabling first-party error reporting.

flags.label: Use Mantle
flags.description: Routes all API calls through Bedrock Mantle managed-access layer.

flags.label: Use Vertex
flags.description: Routes all API calls through Google Vertex AI, disabling first-party error reporting.

flags.label: Container ID
flags.description: Sets the container ID forwarded as the x-claude-remote-container-id request header.

flags.label: Environment Kind
flags.description: Declares the environment type (e.g. bridge, byoc, anthropic_cloud), affecting transport and control-flow.

flags.label: Runner Version
flags.description: Forwards a runner version string as the x-environment-runner-version header on remote connections.

flags.label: Host Platform
flags.description: Overrides the detected host OS platform (win32, darwin, linux) for environment fingerprinting.

flags.label: Remote
flags.description: Marks the session as remote, enabling disk persistence of credentials for subprocess access.

flags.label: Remote Environment Type
flags.description: Forwards the remote environment type in telemetry and enables brief-upload mode for attachments.

flags.label: Remote Keepalives
flags.description: Enables periodic keepalive heartbeats on the remote session connection to prevent idle disconnects.

flags.label: Remote Session ID
flags.description: Sets the remote session ID forwarded as the x-claude-remote-session-id request header.

flags.label: Remote Settings Path
flags.description: Overrides remote settings with a local file path, bypassing the settings API fetch.

tokenEffect.notes: Settings file content may inject instructions

flags.label: Workspace Host Paths
flags.description: Pipe-separated host path mappings attached to telemetry events as workspace.host_paths.

flags.label: Additional Protection
flags.description: Adds the x-anthropic-additional-protection header to all API requests for enhanced server-side checks.

flags.label: Sandbox Indicator
flags.description: Renames the Bash tool to SandboxedBash in the UI when sandbox mode is active.

flags.label: Bubblewrap
flags.description: Enables Bubblewrap sandbox isolation on Linux, blocking root bypass of permission checks.

flags.label: Force Sandbox
flags.description: Forces sandbox mode on for bridge/remote sessions regardless of the sandbox option passed.

flags.label: File Read Max Tokens
flags.description: Caps the token output from file-read operations. Default 25,000.

tokenEffect.notes: Limits tokens injected per file read

flags.label: Glob Hidden Files
flags.description: Forces glob searches to include dotfiles and hidden directories.

tokenEffect.notes: More paths surfaced per glob call

flags.label: Glob No Ignore
flags.description: Bypasses .gitignore rules during glob file searches.

tokenEffect.notes: Expands result set; ignored files enter context

flags.label: Glob Timeout
flags.description: Overrides the default ripgrep glob timeout in seconds.

flags.label: Use Native File Search
flags.description: Switches CLAUDE.md discovery from ripgrep to Node.js native filesystem traversal.

flags.label: Action
flags.description: Signals that Claude Code is running as a GitHub Actions workflow step.

flags.label: Don't Inherit Env
flags.description: Strips the parent shell's environment variables from subprocess execution.

flags.label: Entrypoint
flags.description: Identifies the launch surface (cli, sdk-cli, mcp, claude-desktop) used in version strings and telemetry.

flags.label: Git Bash Path
flags.description: Overrides the auto-detected Git Bash executable path on Windows.

flags.label: Max Retries
flags.description: Overrides the default maximum retry count for failed Anthropic API calls.

flags.label: New Init
flags.description: Switches the /init command to generate multiple scoped CLAUDE.md files instead of one.

tokenEffect.notes: Multiple CLAUDE.md files loaded at session start

flags.label: Perforce Mode
flags.description: Enables Perforce VCS mode, injecting p4 checkout instructions into the system context.

tokenEffect.notes: Appends Perforce workspace instructions

flags.label: PowerShell Parse Timeout
flags.description: Overrides the timeout for PowerShell command parsing and result classification.

flags.label: Session End Hooks Timeout
flags.description: Caps the maximum wait time for session-end hooks before the process exits.

flags.label: Shell
flags.description: Forces Claude Code to use a specific bash or zsh binary instead of auto-detecting.

flags.label: Shell Prefix
flags.description: Prepends a custom command string before every shell invocation, including MCP stdio servers.

flags.label: Tmpdir
flags.description: Overrides the temporary directory used for prompt files and shell snapshots.

flags.label: Base Ref
flags.description: Sets the git ref used as the merge-base for diff and PR review operations.

tokenEffect.notes: Determines scope of diff injected into context

flags.label: Base Refs
flags.description: Provides a map of repo-path → base-ref pairs for multi-checkout diff operations.

tokenEffect.notes: Controls diff scope across multiple repos

flags.label: Is Cowork
flags.description: Enables cowork collaboration mode, triggering eager cache flushes and shared settings.

tokenEffect.notes: Forces prompt-cache break on each flush

flags.label: SSE Port
flags.description: Pins the IDE SSE port used for auto-connecting to a running editor extension.

flags.label: Team Name
flags.description: Sets the team context name required for multi-agent broadcast and teammate messaging.

flags.label: Team Onboarding
flags.description: Controls team onboarding UI mode; accepts "banner" or "step" to activate the onboarding flow.

tokenEffect.notes: Onboarding prompt injected once per flow

flags.label: Teammate Command
flags.description: Overrides the shell command used to spawn teammate sub-agents in a swarm.

flags.label: Use Cowork Plugins
flags.description: Switches the plugin and settings file paths to the cowork-specific variants.

tokenEffect.notes: Cowork plugins may add tool schemas

flags.label: Worker Epoch
flags.description: Supplies the worker epoch integer required to register a CCR bridge worker session.

flags.label: Byoc Enable Datadog
flags.description: TODO: Add description

flags.label: Datadog Flush Interval
flags.description: Overrides the Datadog log-batch flush interval in milliseconds. Default 15,000.

flags.label: Disable Nonessential Traffic
flags.description: Blocks all non-essential outbound network calls, including telemetry and analytics.

flags.label: Emit Session State Events
flags.description: Enables emission of session-state-changed events on the SDK output stream.

flags.label: Emit Tool Use Summaries
flags.description: Enables tool-use summary emission for SDK consumers tracking tool activity.

flags.label: Enable Feedback Survey For Otel
flags.description: TODO: Add description

flags.label: Enable Telemetry
flags.description: Activates third-party OpenTelemetry trace and metric export for the session.

flags.label: Enhanced Telemetry Beta
flags.description: Opts into the enhanced beta tracing pipeline alongside ENABLE_ENHANCED_TELEMETRY_BETA.

flags.label: OTel Flush Timeout
flags.description: Caps the time allotted for OpenTelemetry to flush all spans before process exit. Default 5,000ms.

flags.label: OTel Headers Debounce
flags.description: Sets the debounce window for re-executing the OTel headers helper script.

flags.label: OTel Shutdown Timeout
flags.description: Caps the time allotted for graceful OpenTelemetry provider shutdown. Default 2,000ms.

flags.label: Tags
flags.description: Attaches arbitrary tag strings to the session metadata sent with each API request.

flags.label: Tmux Prefix
flags.description: Records the active tmux prefix key for display in the detach hint UI.

flags.label: Tmux Prefix Conflicts
flags.description: Signals that the tmux prefix conflicts with a Claude keybinding, adjusting the detach hint.

flags.label: Tmux Session
flags.description: Stores the name of the active tmux session for display in the status bar.

flags.label: Tmux Truecolor
flags.description: Prevents Claude from downgrading color depth to 256 colours inside a tmux session.

flags.label: Config Dir
flags.description: Overrides the Anthropic config directory root, bypassing the default XDG_CONFIG_HOME/APPDATA-derived path used to locate profiles and credentials.

flags.label: Federation Rule ID
flags.description: Sets the OIDC federation rule ID for token exchange; profile-level authentication.federation_rule_id takes precedence.

flags.label: Organization ID
flags.description: Pins the organization ID used for OIDC federation auth when config.organization_id is not set in the profile.

flags.label: Scope
flags.description: Sets the OAuth scope sent during token exchange, used as a fallback when authentication.scope is not defined in the profile.

flags.label: Service Account ID
flags.description: Service account ID exchanged at the OIDC federation token endpoint alongside the identity token to mint an access token.

flags.label: Webhook Signing Key
flags.description: TODO: Add description

flags.label: Workspace Id
flags.description: TODO: Add description

flags.label: Agent
flags.description: Labels the current session with its parent agent name during concurrent-session registration.

flags.label: Agent Rule Disabled
flags.description: Bun-runtime sentinel set by the Claude Code binary so that tools the CLI shells out to (Bun, and sibling coding agents like Cursor) recognise an AI agent is driving the session and skip interactive 'agent auto-rule' heuristics. Not a user-tunable feature — set automatically at process start.

flags.label: Agent View Relaunch
flags.description: TODO: Add description

flags.label: Bench Live Counts
flags.description: TODO: Add description

flags.label: Classifier Summary
flags.description: Forces the post-turn classifier into LLM mode when truthy, heuristic when falsy.

tokenEffect.notes: LLM mode adds a small classifier call per turn

flags.label: Daemon Cold Start
flags.description: Overrides daemon cold-start behaviour — accepts 'transient' or 'ask'.

flags.label: Disable Agents Fleet
flags.description: Disables the background-agents fleet (claude agents, --bg, /background, on-demand daemon).

flags.label: Disable Agent View
flags.description: TODO: Add description

flags.label: Disable Alternate Screen
flags.description: TODO: Add description

flags.label: Enable Opus
flags.description: TODO: Add description

flags.label: Force Sync Output
flags.description: TODO: Add description

flags.label: Investigate First
flags.description: TODO: Add description

flags.label: Loop Persistent
flags.description: TODO: Add description

flags.label: Max Turns
flags.description: TODO: Add description

flags.label: Mid Conversation System
flags.description: TODO: Add description

flags.label: Native Cursor
flags.description: TODO: Add description

flags.label: Opus
flags.description: TODO: Add description

flags.label: Package Manager Auto Update
flags.description: TODO: Add description

flags.label: Proactive
flags.description: TODO: Add description

flags.label: Rate Limit Tier
flags.description: Pins the OAuth rate-limit tier passed to forked background sessions.

flags.label: Repl
flags.description: Forces REPL mode on or off, overriding the GrowthBook feature-flag default.

flags.label: Retry Watchdog
flags.description: Enables a retry watchdog on Linux remote entrypoints that forces retries on ECONNRESET/EPIPE and other transient network errors.

flags.label: Session Id
flags.description: Internal session identifier propagated to child processes for telemetry.

flags.label: Session Kind
flags.description: Marks the session as 'bg', 'daemon', or 'daemon-worker' for forked children.

flags.label: Session Log
flags.description: Path to the per-session log file; set when forking background sessions.

flags.label: Session Name
flags.description: Human-readable name attached to a forked background session.

flags.label: Subscription Type
flags.description: Pins the OAuth subscription tier passed to forked background sessions.

flags.label: Supervised
flags.description: TODO: Add description

flags.label: System Prompt Gb Feature
flags.description: Overrides the remote-mode system prompt via a GrowthBook feature-flag key.

tokenEffect.notes: Replaces entire system prompt when set

flags.label: Tee Sdk Stdout
flags.description: TODO: Add description

flags.label: Test Fixtures Root
flags.description: Points the VCR fixture loader to a custom root directory for test recordings.

flags.label: Tui Just Switched
flags.description: Internal marker set by the CLI when relaunching into a new TUI mode such as fullscreen.

flags.label: Use PowerShell Tool
flags.description: Enables the PowerShell tool as a Bash alternative; auto-enabled on Windows if no deny rule exists.

tokenEffect.notes: Adds PowerShell tool schema to tool list

flags.label: Verify Prompt
flags.description: Arms an experimental verify-prompt pass that re-checks the model's response.

tokenEffect.notes: Adds a verification turn per response

flags.label: Version
flags.description: TODO: Add description

flags.label: Voice Forward Interims Typed
flags.description: TODO: Add description
